panels.description: Medium shot: Kotick, a magnificent white seal with a curly mane, stands on a rocky, misty shoreline looking out at a vast, grey ocean. His expression is thoughtful and slightly melancholic, reflecting on his unique life journey. Soft morning light casts subtle shadows, emphasizing his contemplative mood. Eye-level camera angle.

bubbles.text: I am old, and I shall never live to see that day, but others will.
I am the only white seal that has ever been born on the beaches, and I am the only seal, black or white, who ever thought of looking for new islands.

panels.description: Medium shot: Matkah, a seasoned brown seal with a wise and gentle expression, affectionately nuzzles Kotick on a bustling Novastoshnah beach. Kotick, now a large white sea-catch, listens with a mixture of respect and resolve, his expression hinting at his wanderlust. Other seals are blurred in the warm background. Eye-level shot.

bubbles.text: That summer, Matkah, his mother, begged him to marry and settle down.
Remember, Mother, it is always the seventh wave that goes farthest up the beach.

panels.description: Wide shot: Kotick, the white seal, and a sleek, unnamed female seal engage in a joyous 'Fire-dance' on the wet sands of Lukannon Beach. Their bodies are caught in dynamic, twirling poses against the vibrant orange and purple hues of a twilight sky. Silhouettes of distant seals dot the horizon, adding to the romantic and celebratory atmosphere.

bubbles.text: Kotick danced the Fire-dance with her... the night before he set off on his last exploration.

panels.description: Medium shot: Kotick (white seal) is curled up peacefully on a thick bed of swaying green seaweed on the ocean floor near Copper Island. Gentle, filtered blue light streams through the water. His eyes slowly open, a subtle ripple of movement as he stretches, sensing a soft bump against the weed-bed. Calm underwater scene.

bubbles.text: He curled himself up and went to sleep on the hollows of the ground swell.
About midnight, he felt himself gently bumped... 'Hm, tide's running strong tonight.'

panels.description: Medium-close shot: Kotick (white seal) recoils, surprised, fins splayed wide. His eyes are huge, focused on something unseen in the murky depths just behind him. Shadowy, immense forms of unknown creatures are faintly visible, their dark outlines suggesting their size, nosing through heavy kelp. Dramatic underwater lighting, capturing Kotick's wonder and slight alarm.

bubbles.text: Then he jumped like a cat, for he saw huge things nosing about in the shoal water.
By the Great Combers of Magellan!

panels.description: Close-up: Kotick's face underwater, his white fur detailed by the clear water. His eyes are wide with a sudden, profound realization and excitement, a subtle smile spreading on his muzzle. Bubbles gently drift past his face, enhancing the magical moment of discovery. The background is a soft, out-of-focus blue.

bubbles.text: He thought he had found Sea Cow at last.

panels.description: Wide underwater shot: Kotick (white seal) gracefully swims amidst several large, gentle Sea Cows (dugongs/manatees) as they peacefully graze on a vibrant, lush coral reef. Kotick appears to be conversing, gesturing with a flipper, while the Sea Cows calmly 'schlooping and chumping' on the weeds. Bright, clear blue water, with sun rays filtering down from the surface.

bubbles.text: The sea cows went on schlooping and grazing... and Kotick asked them questions in every language that he had picked up in his travels.
